headline: Stop w2 garlic water now — deadline is tomorrow.
weather_notes: Complete all garden tasks before 10 AM — Fire Weather Watch active today until 10 PM MDT brings gusty wind and extreme low humidity.
Check potato_bags soil moisture today — grow bags dry out faster than ground beds under Fire Weather Watch conditions and bags last watered June 18.
Run zone 1 Sunday morning if tonight's isolated storms (30% chance) deliver nothing — tomatoes and beans last watered June 18 face 88–91°F heat through Monday.

surfaced_tasks.title: Stop watering
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due tomorrow — zone 2 last ran June 18 and harvest is 25 days out; exclude w2 from all future zone 2 runs starting today.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for hornworms — apply Bt if found
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due today on 42-day Amish Paste — 7 days of 89–97°F heat drives peak hornworm feeding; check lower leaves for frass this morning.

suggested_tasks.title: Harvest ripe blackberries before they soften
suggested_tasks.description: Berries first observed June 14 — 6 days of 89–97°F heat will have ripened and begun softening fruit; pick now before they pass peak.
